programme.title: The Salvation
programme.desc: After shooting the man who murdered his wife, a Danish settler (Mads Mikkelsen) incurs the wrath of the man's brother (Jeffrey Dean Morgan), a ruthless land baron who rules their frontier town.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Nightingale
programme.desc: Clare, a young Irish convict, chases a British officer through the rugged Tasmanian wilderness and is bent on revenge for a terrible act of violence the man committed against her family. On the way, she enlists the services of Aboriginal tracker Billy, who is marked by trauma from his own violence-filled past.

programme.title: True History of the Kelly Gang
programme.desc: An exploration of Australian bushranger Ned Kelly and his gang as they attempt to evade authorities during the 1870s.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Murder at Yellowstone City
programme.desc: The once peaceful and booming Yellowstone City has fallen on hard times, but when a local prospector strikes gold, things seem to turn around. However, any hope is soon shattered when the prospector is found dead and the sheriff quickly arrests a mysterious newcomer. As the brutal murders continue, worried residents start to prepare for a final showdown that pits neighbor against neighbor.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Black '47
programme.desc: In 1847 an Irish mercenary fighting for the British army abandons his post to seek revenge on those responsible for the death of his family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Comic Book Men
programme.desc: Ming arranges for the Stash to join in on the local sidewalk sale; Walt sells some early "Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles" comics.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Terror
programme.sub-title: Infamy: All the Demons Are Still in Hell
programme.desc: After Pearl Harbor, the Terminal Islanders are evicted from their homes and must find shelter elsewhere; while Henry, separated from his family, faces injustice at the hands of the government, Chester engages in a paranoid search for answers.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: As the Terminal Islanders adjust to their new surroundings, Chester tries to provide for his family, while fending off the evil that follows him; Henry reels from the trauma of his imprisonment; Asako sees bad omens; Amy takes up a new job.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: Chester, in search of a better life, is treated with hostility by his fellow Americans; Luz hopes to be accepted by Henry and Asako in their new home as the Japanese American community celebrates Obon, a festival to commemorate the dead.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The Japanese Americans are forced to undertake a humiliating exercise that divides the community; Chester comes face to face with a man who forces him to question his very nature; Luz, stricken by grief, is forced to make an important choice.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A story of the past provides insight into the present evil that stalks the Terminal Islanders; Chester returns home to his family; Henry and Asako are faced with a difficult decision.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The Nakayamas have been torn apart; Chester searches for the person he believes can help, by any means necessary; an outbreak in the community forces Amy to act, though she's caught between doing what she's told and doing what's right.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: Chester and Luz have reached a turning point in their relationship; Amy must take matters into her own hands as she's tormented by a powerful nemesis; Chester meets a boy who gives him answers.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The Terminal Islanders return home to find that things have changed since they left; the Nakayamas, still tense from the pain they've inflicted on one another, must come together to battle the spirit that threatens their future.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: Henry and Asako look to the past to provide answers to their current turmoil; Chester and Luz grapple with their identities in hopes of saving those who are dearest to them; Amy and Yamato-san struggle to once again assimilate into American life.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Terror
programme.sub-title: Infamy: A Sparrow in a Swallow's Nest
programme.desc: In 1941, Chester Nakayama is caught between his insular Japanese-American neighborhood on Terminal Island and his current all-American life; extreme circumstances push his community and personal life to the brink, all while someone watches closely.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Comic Book Men
programme.desc: Mike and Ming participate in a 5K zombie run for Kevin's charity; Walt buys an unusual item.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Comic Book Men
programme.desc: Kevin visits the Stash for a book signing; Jay acts as security; a customer brings in original artwork.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The 101 Scariest Horror Movie Moments of All Time
programme.desc: The top ten most iconic moments in horror movie history are revealed.

programme.title: The Cellar
programme.desc: A woman must confront an ancient and powerful entity after her daughter mysteriously vanishes in the cellar of their new home.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Dark and the Wicked
programme.desc: Plagued by waking nightmares, two siblings suspect that something evil is taking over their family at an isolated farmhouse.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: In a Violent Nature
programme.desc: When a group of teens takes a locket from a collapsed fire tower in the woods, they unwittingly resurrect the rotting corpse of Johnny, a vengeful spirit spurred on by a horrific 60-year-old crime. The undead killer soon embarks on a bloody rampage to retrieve the stolen locket, methodically slaughtering anyone who gets in his way.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: When Evil Lurks
programme.desc: The residents of a small rural town discover that a demon is about to be born among them. They desperately try to escape -- but it may be too late.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Stopmotion
programme.desc: A talented stop-motion animator becomes consumed by the grotesque world of her horrifying creations -- with deadly results.

programme.title: Boys from County Hell
programme.desc: Some hardy road workers, led by a bickering father and son, must survive the night when they accidentally awaken an ancient Irish vampire.

programme.title: Get Away
programme.desc: A remote getaway takes an unexpected turn when a family discovers the island that they're on is inhabited by a serial killer.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mandrake
programme.desc: Probation officer Cathy Madden is given the task of rehabilitating notorious killer "Bloody" Mary Laidlaw back into society after 20 years in jail. Cathy's beliefs are firmly tested when two children disappear near Mary's farm.

programme.title: Caveat
programme.desc: A desperate drifter suffering from partial memory loss agrees to look after his landlord's psychologically troubled niece in an isolated island mansion.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Last Drive-in With Joe Bob Briggs
programme.desc: Joe Bob Briggs offers up an eclectic pairing of films, from horror classics to cult favorites.

programme.title: The Last Drive-in With Joe Bob Briggs
programme.desc: Joe Bob Briggs offers up an eclectic pairing of films, from horror classics to cult favorites.
